summary: Collected Playwright evidence for native vs custom tree/form/kanban and produced gap classification with screenshots.
risks: Custom deep-link fixed cases (542/543) fall back to login in automated session while native remains reachable.
For discovered tri-view action 26, custom page shell is present but main render parity is missing versus native.
next_step: Open a screen task to isolate deep-link bootstrap gap (token/session restore vs route guard) before final parity verification.
